core.cli.help:
MarkLocal — local Markdown editor and viewer for Windows.

Usage:
  marklocal.exe                          Open the app with a new document.
  marklocal.exe <file.md>                Open the file in the interface.
  marklocal.exe --export-html <file>     Convert to HTML without the interface.
                  [--output path.html]   Output path (defaults next to the .md).
                  [--theme light|dark]   CSS to apply to the exported HTML.
  marklocal.exe --version                Show the version.
  marklocal.exe --help                   Show this help.
core.cli.missingExportPath: Missing the Markdown file path after --export-html.
core.cli.unknownTheme: Unknown theme. Use light or dark.
